title: ⚠️ Cancer Alert
body: 10 people died today because of cancer. Early screening saves lives!

title: 🚨 Heart Health
body: Heart disease claims 18 million lives annually. Protect your heart today!

title: ⚠️ Stroke Warning
body: A stroke kills one person every 40 seconds. Know the signs—Act FAST!

title: 🚑 Diabetes Prevention
body: 8 out of 10 diabetes cases can be prevented. Take control of your diet!

title: ⚠️ Diabetes Risk
body: Every 30 seconds, a limb is lost due to diabetes. Stay vigilant!

title: 🚨 Air Pollution Alert
body: 7 million deaths per year are caused by air pollution. Protect your lungs!

title: ⚠️ Cancer Prevention
body: 60% of cancer deaths are preventable. Get regular check-ups!

title: 🚑 Diet and Health
body: 1 in 5 deaths globally is linked to an unhealthy diet. Eat smart!

title: ⚠️ Blood Pressure Warning
body: Ignoring high blood pressure can lead to stroke or heart failure!

title: 🚨 Heart Attack Awareness
body: 12% of people ignore their first heart attack symptoms. Don’t be one of them!

title: ⚠️ Tuberculosis Warning
body: Tuberculosis kills 1.5 million people yearly. Early diagnosis saves lives!

title: ⚠️ Antibiotic Resistance
body: Antibiotic resistance could cause 10 million deaths by 2050. Use them wisely!

title: 🚑 Hepatitis Alert
body: Hepatitis B & C kill over 1.3 million people annually. Get tested!

title: ⚠️ Malaria Risk
body: Malaria claims a child's life every 2 minutes. Prevention is key!

title: 🚨 Flu Vaccination
body: Flu-related deaths could be 50% lower with vaccines. Get yours today!

title: ⚠️ Dengue Alert
body: Dengue cases are rising! Protect yourself from mosquito bites.

title: 🚑 Rabies Prevention
body: Rabies is 100% fatal but also 100% preventable. Vaccinate pets!

title: ⚠️ HIV Awareness
body: HIV still affects millions. Get tested and know your status!

title: 🚨 Monkeypox Update
body: Monkeypox cases are spreading. Stay informed and protected!

title: ⚠️ Depression Awareness
body: Depression affects 280 million people worldwide. Seek help, don’t suffer alone!

title: 🚨 Suicide Prevention
body: Every 40 seconds, someone dies by suicide. Mental health matters!

title: ⚠️ Stress and Immunity
body: Chronic stress weakens your immune system. Take time to relax!

title: 🚑 Workplace Burnout
body: Workplace burnout increases heart disease risk. Take care of yourself!

title: ⚠️ Anxiety Awareness
body: Anxiety disorders affect 1 in 5 people. You are not alone!

title: 🚨 Loneliness Impact
body: Loneliness is as harmful as smoking 15 cigarettes a day! Stay connected.

title: ⚠️ PTSD Awareness
body: PTSD affects millions. Trauma deserves healing!

title: 🚑 Stress and Diabetes
body: High cortisol levels from stress can lead to diabetes. Find balance!

title: ⚠️ Migraine Awareness
body: More than 1 billion people suffer from migraines. Don’t ignore persistent headaches!

title: 🚨 Alcohol Abuse
body: Alcohol abuse is linked to over 3 million deaths yearly. Drink responsibly!

title: ⚠️ Smoking Dangers
body: Smoking kills 8 million people annually. Quit before it’s too late!

title: 🚨 Sedentary Lifestyle
body: 1 in 4 deaths worldwide is due to a sedentary lifestyle. Move more!

title: ⚠️ Processed Food Risks
body: Processed food increases cancer risk. Choose fresh and natural!

title: 🚑 Sugar and Health
body: 1 in 10 deaths is linked to excessive sugar intake. Cut down today!

title: ⚠️ Dementia and Diet
body: Ultra-processed foods increase dementia risk. Eat smart!

title: 🚨 Exercise Benefits
body: Just 30 minutes of exercise daily can reduce premature death risk by 35%!

title: ⚠️ Hydration and Brain Health
body: Dehydration affects brain function. Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily!

title: 🚑 Painkillers and Kidney Health
body: Overuse of painkillers can damage kidneys. Use them wisely!

title: ⚠️ High Salt Intake
body: High salt intake is a silent killer! Lower your sodium consumption.

title: 🚨 Energy Drink Risks
body: Energy drinks increase heart attack risk. Consume responsibly!

title: ⚠️ Maternal Health
body: 830 women die every day from pregnancy complications. Get proper care!

title: 🚨 Domestic Violence Awareness
body: 1 in 3 women experience domestic violence. Speak up and get support!

title: ⚠️ Breast Cancer Awareness
body: Breast cancer is the most common cancer in women. Early detection saves lives!

title: 🚑 Cervical Cancer Prevention
body: Cervical cancer is 100% preventable. Get vaccinated and screened!

title: ⚠️ Infant Mortality
body: 2 million babies die within their first month of life. Prenatal care is essential!

title: 🚨 Childhood Obesity
body: Child obesity rates are skyrocketing. Encourage healthy eating habits!

title: ⚠️ Infant Hygiene
body: 300,000 newborns die annually due to infections. Hygiene is crucial!

title: 🚑 Postpartum Depression
body: Postpartum depression affects 1 in 7 women. Mental health matters!

title: ⚠️ Childhood Asthma
body: Childhood asthma is rising due to pollution. Keep kids’ lungs safe!

title: 🚨 Premature Births
body: 1 in 10 babies is born prematurely. Prenatal care makes a difference!

title: ⚠️ Pancreatic Cancer
body: Pancreatic cancer has a 5-year survival rate of only 11%. Catch it early!

title: 🚨 Osteoporosis Awareness
body: Osteoporosis affects 1 in 3 women after menopause. Bone health matters!

title: ⚠️ Liver Disease Risks
body: Liver disease is the 10th leading cause of death worldwide. Avoid alcohol abuse!

title: 🚑 Brain Aneurysms
body: Brain aneurysms kill thousands without warning. Know the risk factors!

title: ⚠️ Alzheimer’s Awareness
body: Alzheimer’s affects 55 million people worldwide. Prevention starts now!

title: 🚨 Parkinson’s Disease
body: Parkinson’s disease is rising fast. Watch for early tremors!

title: ⚠️ Kidney Failure Risks
body: Kidney failure kills millions worldwide. Stay hydrated and avoid junk food!

title: 🚑 Cancer and Obesity
body: 1 in 3 cancers is linked to obesity. Maintain a healthy weight!

title: ⚠️ Lung Cancer
body: Lung cancer is the deadliest cancer. Smoking increases the risk by 90%!

title: 🚨 Stroke Recovery
body: More than 50% of stroke survivors live with long-term disabilities. Act fast!

title: ⚠️ Skipping Breakfast
body: Skipping breakfast increases heart attack risk by 27%. Eat wisely!

title: 🚨 Red Meat and Cancer
body: Too much red meat increases bowel cancer risk by 30%. Eat in moderation!

title: ⚠️ Artificial Sweeteners
body: Artificial sweeteners increase metabolic disorder risk. Watch your intake!

title: 🚑 Fiber Deficiency
body: Fiber deficiency causes digestive issues. Eat more whole grains!

title: ⚠️ Vitamin D Deficiency
body: 1 in 3 people suffer from Vitamin D deficiency. Get some sunlight!

title: 🚨 Iron Deficiency
body: Iron deficiency is the leading cause of anemia worldwide. Eat iron-rich foods!

title: ⚠️ Eating Too Fast
body: Eating too fast increases the risk of obesity by 42%. Slow down!

title: 🚑 Trans Fats
body: Trans fats increase heart disease risk by 75%. Avoid junk food!

title: ⚠️ Sugary Drinks
body: Drinking sugary drinks daily increases diabetes risk by 25%. Choose water instead!

title: 🚨 Low Potassium Risks
body: Low potassium levels increase the risk of stroke. Eat bananas, oranges, and greens!
